blocks.text: Select Lever Assy. removal/attachment

items: If there are components of the SRS airbag system in the vicinity, refer to the work precautions and configuration drawings described for the SRS airbag system before proceeding.

blocks.text: 1. Driver lower cover removal
2. Auto A/C control unit removal
3. Select lever side Remove control wire
Set the select lever to the R position.
Unlock the socket holder retainer by releasing the retainer lock (A).
Turn the socket holder retainer (A) fully counterclockwise to push in the retainer lock (B).
Hold the socket holder (A) and pull it down, then pull the socket holder out of the select lever bracket base (B) and remove the control wire (C).

items: When removing the control wire, be sure to remove it by holding the socket holder. Do not remove the control wire by holding the control wire guide pipe (D).

blocks.text: 4. Select Lever Assy. removal
Disconnect the coupler (A).
1. Select Lever Assy. installation
Install the select lever assembly.
2. Select Lever Side Control Wire Installation
Push the control wire (A) all the way down and pull it back one step to put the transmission in the R position.

items: Do not adjust by holding the control wire guide pipe (B).

blocks.text: Turn ignition to ON mode. Verify that the shift position indicator in the combination meter shows R. Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode.

Set the select lever to the R position. Insert a 6.0 mm diameter round bar (B) into the positioning hole (A) in the select lever to secure the select lever in the R position. After fixing, check that the select lever does not move.
Unlock the socket holder retainer by releasing the retainer lock (A).
Turn the socket holder retainer (A) fully in the direction of the arrow (B) and push in the retainer lock (C).

Hold the socket holder (A) and align the mounting portion of the socket holder with the opening (C) in the select lever bracket base (B) and align the control wire end (D) with the corner (F) of the stud bolt (E). Push the socket holder into the bracket base until it is secured to the bracket base. When the socket holder is pushed down to the butt of the select lever opening, the retainer lock is released and the socket holder retainer is returned by spring force, securing the socket holder to the select lever bracket base.

items: When installing the control wire, always install by holding the socket holder. Do not install the control wire by holding the control wire guide pipe (G).

blocks.text: Push in the retainer lock (A) to secure the socket holder retainer (B). Ensure that the socket holder is securely fastened to the select lever bracket base.

items: Ensure that the back of the retainer lock (C) is aligned with the lock mounting side (D). If the back of the retainer lock protrudes from the mounting side, turn the socket holder retainer slightly counterclockwise to push the retainer lock in.

blocks.text: Check that the control wire end is securely attached to the root of the stud bolt.

items.text: If the stud bolt rides up on the base, turn the stud bolt to align the corners and install it.
If the stud bolt rides up on the base, turn the stud bolt to align the corners and install it.
If the wire end is detached from the stud bolt, remove the socket holder from the select lever bracket base and reinstall it.
If the wire end is detached from the stud bolt, remove the socket holder from the select lever bracket base and reinstall it.

blocks.text: Secure the control wire end with the mounting nut (A).
3. Auto A/C control unit installation
4. Driver Lower Cover Installation
